A person born in Sagittarius Ascendant (Dhanus), the 3
sign Aquarius (Kumbha) cannot become a mother's house
(Matru stana). Aquarius is the house of Lord Eshwara and also
the house of gain. Like this different calculations are made to give
prediction. this is not convincing.
As an another example, if the owner of the house stands
in front of his bodyguard's house one cannot assume that be is
the servant or a security guard of that house. That means, any
planet be in any house or sign, fully analyse the significance of
that sign along with that planet and give prediction. If predicted
without knowing the lordship of that planet the prediction
becomes false.
In astrology, there are 9 planets and 12 signs. The sign
Aries (Mesha) is the birth sign of Kaalapurusha or Time
Personified. the 2 house Vrishabha (Taurus) is the house of
Venus (Sukra). Mesha is male sign & Vrishabha is female
sign.
